title: 2025 Public Transport Voucher (PTV) Exercise
text:
2025 Public Transport Voucher (PTV) Exercise - SupportGoWhere
2025 Public Transport Voucher (PTV) Exercise
Share link
Provides lower-income households with PTVs to cope with the fare adjustment from 27 December 2025.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
PTVs worth $60 each, which can be used to top up fare cards or buy monthly passes
Applications and appeals will be processed within four to six weeks from the date of application
Collapse all sections
About this support

PTVs worth S$60 each, which can be used to top up fare cards or buy monthly passes.

Who is this for?

Resident households with monthly household income per person of not more than S$1,800.

At least one member of the household must be a Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident.

How to apply?

Households that received a PTV under the 2024 PTV Exercise and continue to meet the income eligibility criterion would have received a digital or physical PTV notification letter (depending on indicated contact preference) by mid-January 2026.

Households that meet the income eligibility criterion but did not receive a PTV may apply online or in person at their local Community Centres/Clubs (CCs) from 20 January 2026. Households that missed the income eligibility criterion slightly can request a review of their eligibility through the same link or approach their local CCs for assistance.

For more information, you may visit this page.

Where can I find help?

View more details

1800 278 3500 (Monday to Friday: 9am – 6pm, excluding Public Holidays)




Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

mot@mot.gov.sg

Visit your nearest Community Centres/Clubs

Scheme last updated 11 Mar 2026
